commandArgs: Do not call any tool and do not read any repository file. From startup context already supplied to this fresh task only, report: (1) every available skill whose name starts with koda-c-, exactly as listed; (2) the total number; (3) one repository guidance rule about where project skills must live. If startup context lacks an item, say unavailable instead of searching. Finish with DISCOVERY_SOURCE: STARTUP_CONTEXT_ONLY.
